sections.name: Section 5 — Offer: 3+3 Bundle with Urgency + Permission (R6)
sections.content_preview: If Pre-K is on your horizon, or even if it's still a few months out, the most important thing you can give your child right now is **consistent daily wear**. Not 3 hours a week. Not just on weekends.
